metadata.description: Cross-verification of neuroanatomy specimen labels from PDF atlas, image_labels.json, and muscle image data

sources.hwp: Brain Encephalon 모형 사진.by케이First.hwp (BS model references: BS-20/22 p.215, BS6/1 p.213, BS5 p.210-211)
sources.muscle_images: 29 KakaoTalk screenshots from Visible Body (750x1334 PNG)

F.structure: Superior temporal gyrus of temporal lobe

disagreements.assessment: POSSIBLE MISMATCH: image_labels says 시교차/대뇌다리 but PDF H1-2 has Lentiform nucleus/Internal capsule. The image may actually be H1-3 (which has Optic nerve, Cerebral peduncle).

image_labels says basal ganglia level (caudate, lentiform, thalamus, internal capsule) but PDF H1-3 shows olfactory tract, optic nerve, infundibulum, cerebral peduncle. These are DIFFERENT levels. The image_labels H1-3 description matches PDF H1-2 better.

disagreements.issue: image_labels.json says 넓은목근 (Sternohyoid) but 넓은목근 is actually Platysma, not Sternohyoid. Sternohyoid is 복장목뿔근. This is either a mislabel in image_labels.json or the image shows Platysma rather than Sternohyoid.
disagreements.correction_suggestion: If the muscle shown is flat and superficial in the neck: Platysma (넓은목근). If it is a strap muscle from sternum to hyoid: Sternohyoid (복장목뿔근).

notes.note: H1-1 label consistent: both reference corpus callosum and lateral ventricle level structures

H1-5: image_labels says Pons/Cerebellum/4th ventricle which partially matches PDF H1-5 (Pyramid of medulla oblongata, Cerebellar hemisphere, Spinal cord). Both are inferior horizontal sections but structures differ slightly.

image_labels.json uses B-XX format (B-2 through B-14) for coronal/sagittal specimens. The PDF uses 1C/2C for coronal, S1/S2 for sagittal, H1 for horizontal. These are DIFFERENT numbering systems. B-XX appears to be a lab-specific numbering system while 1C/2C/S/H is the PDF atlas numbering. Direct cross-reference between B-XX and 1C/2C is NOT reliable without additional mapping information.

HWP file contains descriptions of BS-20/22 (p.215), BS 6/1 (p.213), and BS5 (p.210-211). It warns that BS5/1 model numbering may differ from BS5. The Korean text was successfully decoded from UTF-16LE encoding.

31 HEIC images (IMG_7141-7171) cover: hemisection, coronal series (1C/2C), sagittal series (S1/S2), horizontal series (H1), and surface views. All are mapped in image_labels.json but many use B-XX numbering that does not directly correspond to PDF 1C/2C/S/H numbering.

29 muscle images split into two sequences: 204728-204752 (lower limb muscles, anterior to posterior) and 204822-204833 (neck/suprahyoid/infrahyoid muscles). The sequence suggests systematic Visible Body screenshots progressing through muscle groups.
